title: agalma delavayi
intro: Agalma delavayi, also known as Delavay's Agalma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The aerial parts of Agalma delavayi are commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to relieve symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
